projectDescription: The enterprise AI agent platform for building, deploying, and orchestrating A2A-compliant agents with real-time observability, multi-tenancy, and built-in integrations.
keyFeatures: A2A-compliant agent framework with capability-based routing
Real-time session orchestration and agent coordination
Distributed tracing with W3C Trace Context and OpenTelemetry
Built-in webhook integrations (GitHub, Jira, Slack, Datadog, Zendesk, Bitbucket)
Knowledge base with vector search and RAG (Cortex service)
Dashboard with live session streaming, usage metrics, and alert rules
MCP (Model Context Protocol) bridge for tool integration
API key management with scoped access control
Guard policies for admission control, tool usage, and session limits
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/get_token — exchange client credentials for a JWT
POST /auth/login — email/password login
POST /auth/signup — create user account
POST /agents/register — register an agent with the gateway
POST /agents/deregister — deregister an agent
POST /agents/heartbeat — send agent heartbeat
POST /webhooks/receive — inbound webhook from external services
POST /sessions/init — create a new session (mesh)
POST /sessions/close — close a session (mesh)
POST /sessions/interrupt — interrupt in-flight session streams
POST /telemetry/report — batch telemetry ingest (spans, usage, events)
POST /telemetry/otlp — OTLP-format telemetry ingest
Agent.define_capability(config) — register a capability on an agent
Agent.expose(app, endpoint_path?) — mount A2A endpoints on Express
Agent.register_mcp(server_name, config) — bridge MCP server tools as capabilities
MeshConnector.connect() — register agent and authenticate with mesh
MeshConnector.disconnect() — deregister agent from gateway
RemoteAgent — send tasks and stream responses from any A2A agent
AgentDiscovery — discover agents by fetching their agent cards
SvanticTelemetry.init(options) — initialize OTEL-based telemetry
SvanticTracer.start_span / start_llm_span / start_tool_span — span creation
ContextInjector.inject / ContextExtractor.extract — W3C trace context propagation
svantic status — check gateway and mesh health
svantic agents list — list registered agents
svantic sessions list — list recent sessions
svantic tenants list — list tenants
